name: Chevre and Portabello Mushroom Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray miniature muffin tins with non-stick cooking spray.
3. Press won ton wrappers into the tins.
4. Sauté mushrooms in olive oil until cooked through.
5. Combine sautéed mushrooms, basil, pepper, beaten egg, flour, crumbled chevre, and green onion.
6. Spoon the filling into each won ton wrapper.
7. Paint the wrappers with melted butter.
8. Bake for 20 minutes.
9. Serve warm or at room temperature.
